destinations.evidence: The canonical shared payload validator enforces input-size, precompile-specific routing, URL/model/message checks, base executor fields, zero executor rejection, and TTL bounds.
RPC admission runs parent-state simulation, returns Ok for non-async transactions, then applies the shared static validator and stateful executor/wallet checks before pool insertion.

equivalence_argument: The dispatcher selects precompile-specific validators for HTTP, LLM, long-running HTTP, ZK, FHE, agent, DKMS, persistent agent, and multimodal base requests, and RPC admission invokes the dispatcher on the simulated precompile input before accepting the transaction.
notes: Agent semantics are represented by sovereign and persistent agent precompiles in the current metadata set.
rationale: The commit splits decode-only precompile extraction from validated extraction, adds long-running HTTP and agent validators, adds an AgentCallRequest ABI decoder, and RPC invokes validate_async_payload on the simulated precompile input before state validation. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Shared async payload validation must route by precompile: HTTP validates URL, LLM validates model/messages, long-running HTTP validates executor/TTL plus required url and poll_url schemes and optional result_url scheme, agent-call validates executor/TTL plus non-empty trimmed prompt, and ZK/base precompiles use base executor request validation.
suggested_falsification_tests: For each async precompile type, submit malformed payloads specific to that type: invalid HTTP URL, empty LLM model/messages, empty long-running poll_url or bad URL schemes, empty agent prompt, zero executor, and bad TTL. Assert RPC rejects with invalid async payload before inserting or retaining the transaction in the pool.
summary: Async payload validation is routed by precompile type.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For each async precompile type, submit malformed payloads specific to that type: invalid HTTP URL, empty LLM model/messages, empty long-running poll_url or bad URL schemes, empty agent prompt, zero executor, and bad TTL. Assert RPC rejects with invalid async payload before inserting or retaining the transaction in the pool.
title: Async payload validation is precompile-specific
